reviews.review_description: This game is amazing it is fast paced but you can also have it set to no time limit on the drinks if you don't want to feel rushed but just the best bartender game!!!!

Super fun ,but the physics are janky and the game feels dated.

It would be really amazing if we could get another update to help improve the physics but also the graphics, effects and sounds/dialogue.

The description claims that the game is suitable for professional bartenders. Honestly, it’s not. The bar is awkward to use, and the recipes are questionable at best — a whole ounce of syrup in an Old Fashioned would definitely get sent back, and serving a Manhattan warm is unthinkable.

It might be fun for someone with no experience who just wants to try making cocktails, but for a professional, it’s frustrating and unrealistic.

To the developers: I’m sorry for the harsh review, but I bought the game based on the description, and it simply didn’t meet expectations. That said, if you’re interested in making it more authentic, I’d be happy to share some ideas. A game like this, with a well-designed “Pro” mode, could really have great potential.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the honest feedback — we really appreciate you taking the time to share your thoughts.

The recipes in the game are based on real ones, but we did tweak the amounts a bit to make things easier and more fun for casual play. That said, we totally get how that can be frustrating if you're coming in with professional experience and looking for realism.

Your idea for a Pro mode is actually a great way to bridge that gap — it could really help us meet different players’ expectations. We’d love to hear more of your thoughts. Feel free to reach out to us at contact@flathillgames.com — we’re always looking to improve the game, and input like yours makes a big difference.

reviews.review_description: Didn’t expect to enjoy this as much as I did lol. Physics can be weird but it’s honestly part of the fun.

This could be an awesome game if it WORKED! I deleted it and reinstalled it to no avail. I’ve tried to get Meta support to help but they wanted me to reset my whole device for this one game. If they can’t fix this glitch, DONT DO IT!!!

developer_response.body: Hi, can you write to us at contact@flathillgames.com so that we can see what is the problems and fix the issue that you have. Thanks.

reviews.review_title: Just the game I was waiting for!
reviews.review_description: I used to play a different bartender game that just ended up being practically a basic, single-player only version of this game. This game really makes you put in the work having to do multiple drinks under a time limit, it gives a sense of realism while behind the bar, sure it has some bugs, but it’s a brand new game that will for sure need some fixes, I cannot wait to see this game soar until then!

developer_response.body: Thanks for sharing your experience! We're glad to hear you’re enjoying the challenge of making multiple drinks under pressure. We're focused on making fixes and improvements to enhance the game even more.

reviews.review_description: Great game to chill out and make drinks with friends!

Simple but addictive idea, looks cool, environments look cool.

BUT...

No smooth turning.
Needs ALOT of optimisation, moving the bottle holder / selecter side to side stutters so much i actually think it could make some people sick. Very uncomfortable to see.

No in game options for the audio, you have to exit to the main menu for some off reason.

Also maybe add a bin / trash can to throw unused stuff in so it isnt just all lying over the counter.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback! Smooth turning, a trash can, and audio options will be added in an update soon. The bottle holder is improved in the update, and we'll keep working to make it even better.

reviews.review_description:
.... it needs work. 
Some recipes are interesting, a bit different from the real thing, but that's probably because everyone modify the recipes in every country somehow. A discord server would be good for reporting bugs or a monitor on the wall of the bar to show the discord or community channel like in Demeo so you could create a very nice community around the game. People like to be connected to the community on a permanent basis. 
Should fill in the things and create a professional level because it is good for those who want to learn the basics. The pro level would need a cocktail filter, muddler, cocktail spoon and so on. The game is fine, but the cup grip is too sensitive, sometimes I can't serv the drink because the liquid is so wobbly or something...In multiplayer, if I reach into the bar from outside and start pulling the drink tab, the drinks disappear and the player working inside can no longer see them until I pull the tab again. When the player in the bar reaches a level and a changeover occurs, my microphone stops working. 
As a guest, we need an option where the player at the bar selects a drink and does not automatically receive the order from the game.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your detailed feedback! We're glad you found the recipes interesting and appreciate your suggestions. We already have a Discord server for reporting bugs and connecting with the community, and you can reach out for our support. We are working on improving the cup grip and fixing the multiplayer issues, and you can expect an update soon. Thanks again for your input, and we're excited to keep making the game better!

reviews.review_description:
Brilliant game, and finally a multiplayer bartender app! 

So much fun to be had with various environments and you can play at your own pace! 

Relaxed or competitive modes! 

Multiplayer is a blast! 🔥

developer_response.body: Thank you! We're thrilled you're enjoying the multiplayer experience and the variety of environments. It's great to hear that you appreciate both the relaxed and competitive modes! Your excitement for the game motivates us to keep improving it.

reviews.review_description: Graphics need to be a Lil better, my hand got locked onto a glass and couldn't remove it a few times had to restart... needs a music player like YouTube,  needs smooth turning, and faster movement also needs a crouch button and a calberation mode so u can sit and look standing... I do like some of the physics and the carousel for the bottles I'd nice touch also u can't break glasses or bottles when they drop and couldn't really flip the bottles that good... It's got potential and having multi-player is nice touch as well but need more room for others behind the bar made it kinda hard...for now it's refund till I see some more improvements but not bad for now

developer_response.body: Thank you for sharing your thoughts! We are preparing an update where we are adding smooth turning, height adjusting and metric system measurement. We will consider a jukebox for a future update. You can break the glasses in the game by throwing them but not while you are holding the glass. Stay tuned for updates—we’re dedicated to making it better!

reviews.review_description:
Love the game, but I didn’t find it challenging. I did finish it though, but I got  three stars in every level. It didn’t stop me playing it even though I didn’t find the levels that challenging it was a fun game to pay though there is a few glitches. Glad that they have included the bin and they have made the bottle rack more scrollable which I think was an update that was made yesterday.

I tried the unlimited level, but it didn’t seem to record my scores so maybe they need to work on that

This game was a blast with my friends in multiplayer. Even though we had fun, there's a lot of opportunities for improvement here. Thankfully, I read that the devs are dedicated to implementing user feedback. I see a bright future for this game.

developer_response.body: Dear Alex, thank you for the review. Stay tuned as there are a lot of updates coming soon.

reviews.review_description:
I really wanted to enjoy this app but it still needs some work, especially in multi-player mode.  There is not enough room to
 move around and a jukebox for ambience would be a huge plus.  My friend got his han
d stuck and had to quit mid game.   I like sitting to play at times but had to stand because there is no height setting.  The concept is cool however.  Needs a little more realism because glasses of drinks don't look full when served. Also cann9t crouch or break glassware LOL

developer_response.body: Thanks for your feedback! We are preparing an update where we are adding smooth turning, height adjusting and metric system measurement. We're working on improving multiplayer and will consider adding a jukebox in a future update. You can break the glasses in the game by throwing them but not while you are holding the glass. Stay tuned for updates—we’re committed to making it even better!

reviews.review_title: So much potential with this one!
reviews.review_description: This game brings everything you’d want with bartending in VR including doing it with your friends! Lots of potential with this one!

developer_response.body: Thanks so much! We're excited about bringing bartending to VR, especially with friends. Your feedback means a lot and motivates us to keep pushing the game forward. Cheers!

reviews.review_description: Rough around the edges, but once you get into a rhythm, it really is a satisfying Cooking Mama-style gameplay loop. But with cocktails, which is great for the libation enthusiasts among us. If they can refine animations and controls a bit more, it can be a real gem in the genre.

developer_response.body: Thanks for your feedback! It’s great to hear you’re enjoying the gameplay and cocktail-making. We really appreciate your suggestions about the animations and controls; we’re working on those to make the experience even better. Your insights are really helpful as we continue to improve!

reviews.review_description:
Developers:

Are the drinks traditional? I bought the app to learn traditional drinks or exotic ones. I want to make sure they’re not a take on traditional drinks.

developer_response.body: The recipes in the app are gamified versions of traditional drinks, designed to be both fun and educational. While they stay true to the core elements of classic recipes, the gamified approach adds a unique twist to make learning more engaging. You’ll still get a feel for the traditional methods, but in a more interactive way. Please join our discord (https://discord.gg/qtJvpBj3sQ) if you have more feedback for us.

reviews.review_title: Needs some work but very fun
reviews.review_description:
I played the tutorial and a first mission in this game on standalone Quest 3.

The game is really fun tbh, but it has some bugs that if addressed will make it so much better.

First the hand tracking isn’t the best, sometimes I’m grabbing the wrong item when my virtual hand is right on top of it.

The carousel of liquor is a neat idea, but I feel like it can be better or maybe a wall behind you that all the bottles are on and you turn to select them, and when you put it down for an extended period it snaps back into the wall behind you. I didn’t notice the items you use snapping back into place either…that would be a neat functionality to keep the bar from getting cluttered. Orders come in fast and you can’t worry about moving things back or cleaning up the space. 

Turning is not fun as it is only snap mode…it slouches the drinks and causes me to spill when I snap turn. Please add a smooth turning mode with speed options to make it more user friendly and realistic.

The snap back into place if items and liquor bottles would be neat…just emphasizing it here.

I didn’t see a crouch option…although the first mission gets super busy to worry about picking things up if dropped.

So far the game is really fun and I enjoy the atmosphere…hope the devs can make some adjustments to improve the gameplay, but as is it’s worth every penny.

developer_response.body: Hi, thanks for the detailed feedback. We just released an update where we improved the carousel but we will improve it even further. Smooth turning is coming soon in an update. The liquor bottles are snapping back if you throw them but we will consider adding the time limit for snapping back. Please join our discord (https://discord.gg/qtJvpBj3sQ) so you can follow the progress and give us more feedback how to improve the game

reviews.review_description:
"The Mixologist offers a really chilled out bartender simulator that allows you to show off your mixing skills either alone of with a friend. Sure they could have leaned into the social element a little bit more, and the wheel of booze system is frankly awful, but I’d still recommend mixing up your gaming session with this neat little VR title!"

Read the full review over at The Elite Institute (dot) net!
Its so fun
